codebase_patterns.framework: Python 3.11+ with typer CLI and pydantic data models
codebase_patterns.file_structure: llm_citation_checker/ package with modules: kb.py (loading), matcher.py (matching), models.py (pydantic), typer_cli.py (CLI), reporter.py (reports), main.py (exports)
codebase_patterns.data_directory: data/kb.json - knowledge base with fact-source pairs
codebase_patterns.kb_path_resolution: 1) LCC_KB_PATH env var, 2) relative to package parent dir, 3) CWD/data/kb.json

common_mistakes_to_avoid: KB path: use Path(__file__).parent.parent for package-relative paths
CLI error handling: wrap operations in try-except at the CLI boundary
File encoding: always specify encoding='utf-8' when opening files
Empty input: check for empty stdin before processing
Sentence splitting regex: use r'(?<=[.!?])\s+' as specified in app_spec.txt

key_issues: Missing error handling in CLI commands (HIGH)
No input size limits on stdin.read() (MEDIUM)
LCC_KB_PATH env var not sanitized for path traversal (MEDIUM)
No explicit encoding on file open (LOW)
